<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-1_chunk004.pdf#page=3 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-1 p154 -->

<!-- header: SCHÄFTLARN -->

<!-- header: SCHÄFTLARN -->


[[File:Band03-1_chunk004_p003_img001.jpg|thumb|Teilansicht von D Der hl. Norbert empfängt Skapulier und Regel]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk004_p003_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-1 p155 -->
